summary: Frontend testing completed for Audix Stock Management - All 3 UI changes verified successfully: Android scanner compatibility, Recent Locations removed, Scanner device layout with large buttons

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom navigation on small screens - may intercept clicks on Reports/Settings buttons. Users can use Quick Navigation buttons as workaround.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested UI changes verified: 1) useDeviceDetection hook detects Android scanners and small screens, 2) Dashboard no longer shows 'Recent Locations' - replaced with 'Quick Navigation' (scanner mode) and 'Quick Actions' (desktop mode), 3) Scanner mode (480x800 viewport) shows 6 large navigation buttons (80px height) in 2-column grid + bottom navigation with 5 items

details.quick_navigation: 6 large buttons (Dashboard, Locations, Scan Items, Master Data, Reports, Settings) in 2-column grid
details.bottom_navigation: 5 items visible (Home, Locations, Scan, Reports, Settings)

navigation_buttons_clickable.details: All Quick Navigation buttons successfully navigate to their respective pages (Locations, Reports, Settings, Master Data, Scan Items)

device_detection_hook.details: useDeviceDetection hook correctly detects small screens (<=800px width or <=600px height) and triggers scanner mode UI

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED CLIENT-SIDE using mockData.js and localStorage - no backend API calls
